title: Pix Android Boost
description:
请使用Mobile Glues作为渲染器，否则不受理崩溃问题。

Please use Mobile Glues as your renderer, otherwise crash issues will not be addressed.

Optimization Integration for ZalithLauncher/Fold Craft Launcher
Please go to QQ Channel PixABoost1798 to report issues or suggestions.
body:
Pix Android Boost ✨
 
Make Minecraft Run Smoothly on Your Phone
 
An optimization modpack built specifically for Android devices, designed to let mid-to-low-end phones run Minecraft smoothly without lag.
 
 
 
✨ What It Does For You
 
- 🚀 Boosts FPS & Reduces Lag – Enjoy buttery-smooth gameplay, even on older hardware
​
- ⚡ Faster Launch Times – Less waiting, more playing
​
- 🌡️ Cooler & More Efficient – Lower heat and battery drain, so you can play longer
 
 
 
🎯 Key Features
 
- Minimal changes to core game content, keeping the vanilla feel
​
- Ultra-lightweight mod selection to cut down on load overhead
​
- Supports FCL, Zalith, Amethyst, and most custom launchers
 
 
 
📱 Will It Work On My Phone?
 
- Older/secondary phones (e.g., Huawei Enjoy 8): Tested to reach 20 FPS on 1.20.1 Fabric with natural terrain generation – works great on older devices as long as the game version isn’t too new
​
- Mid-range phones (e.g., Dimensity 8000 / Snapdragon 7 series): Noticeable performance boost, fully playable
​
- Flagship phones (e.g., Snapdragon 8 Gen3): Minor performance gains, can be used with shaders
 
 
 
📦 Install & Play
 
Just install and go – no complex setup required!
